testcase.name: ACOS 2.0 POM E2E Test Suite › should execute a complete lifecycle of all core screens using Page Objects
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › acos.spec.ts:12:3 › ACOS 2.0 POM E2E Test Suite › should execute a complete lifecycle of all core screens using Page Objects
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByTestId('home-screen') Expected: visible Timeout: 15000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for getByTestId('home-screen')
24 | 25 | // Verify Home Screen is visible > 26 | await expect(homePage.screen).toBeVisible({ timeout: 15000 }); | ^ 27 | 28 | // Run accessibility scan to automatically block structural accessibility failures 29 | const results = await new AxeBuilder({ page }) at /app/applet/tests/e2e/acos.spec.ts:26:35
